meta.note: Deterministic agentic eval — real edits/builds in an isolated reactable workspace, checked against ground truth. Fixture restored before every trial.

tasks.instruction: How many decks are in this project? Use the bash tool to run `reactable decks list`, then reply with just the number.
Read the demo deck and tell me its title. Use the read_file tool on decks/demo/deck.work.
Add a new prose slide with id "closing" to the demo deck. You can run `reactable decks slide add demo --id closing --type prose` with the bash tool.
Change the title of the demo deck to exactly "Reactable Live". Use read_file then write_file on decks/demo/deck.work.
Create a new deck titled "Roadmap". You can run `reactable decks new Roadmap` with the bash tool.
The deck "broken" fails `reactable decks validate broken` with a duplicate slide id. Read decks/broken/deck.work, fix it so validation passes (give the two slides distinct ids), and write it back.
Create a file at notes/outline.md containing a markdown bullet list of exactly three talk ideas (one per line, each starting with "- "). Use the write_file tool.
